=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:24-8:3) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D2] (19:3-19:8) TS377008: This uses `yield` for an `Effect` value. `yield*` is the Effect-aware form in this context. effect(missingStarInYieldEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*"

  Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*"

  Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.asVoid(Effect.succeed(1))

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield* Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield* Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D8] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield* Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})


=== [D9] Fix 0: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D9] Fix 1: "Disable missingStarInYieldEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D9] Fix 2: "Replace yield with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/missingStarInYieldEffectGen.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

// --- Should NOT report ---

// correct usage with yield*
export const noError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.succeed(1)
})

// regular generator — not an Effect scope
export function* effectInsideStandardGenerator() {
  yield Effect.never
}

// --- Should report ---

// bare yield inside Effect.gen
export const missingStarInYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
})

// multiple bare yields — generator warning once, per-yield for each
export const missingStarInMultipleYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield Effect.succeed(1)
  yield Effect.succeed(2)
})

// nested Effect.gen — inner generator is also checked
export const missingStarInInnerYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield Effect.succeed(1)
  })
})

// Effect.fn variants
export const effectFnUsage = Effect.fn(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fn named (curried)
export const tracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fn("tracedEffectFnUsage")(function*() {
  yield Effect.never
})

// Effect.fnUntraced
export const untracedEffectFnUsage = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
  yield* Effect.never
})
